p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests with origin=repo_tests: (1) test_repo_ruff_check - runs 'ruff check products/llm_analytics/ products/posthog_ai/' to lint Python files in modified directories, (2) test_repo_python_compile - uses py_compile to verify all Python files compile successfully, (3) test_repo_all_skills_frontmatter - validates all SKILL.md files in products/ have valid YAML frontmatter with 'name' and 'description' fields. All tests verified passing at base commit. Docker image built successfully.

validate.notes: All validations passed. Fixed rubric rules that were checking files not modified by this PR (AGENTS.md) and making incorrect judgments about SKILL.md completeness. The config_edits verification correctly validates the gold solution with a 1.0 score.
